Title: Genkai o koeta atsui tatakai! Gokû tai Bejîta
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Mami Koyama
Plot: Son Goku fights Vegeta, and he uses the Kaiô-Ken technique; Kuririn and Son Gohan fly back to Kame House; Lunch drinks her troubles away in a bar; Vegeta causes a massive earthquake and storm while powering up.
